title: Looking for Category Manager at Zomato

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Zomato
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Category Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
